simple_types.name: Day_Type
simple_types.code: type Day_Type is (Sun, Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat);

documentation.description: Days of the week.

simple_types.name: Month_Type
simple_types.code:
type Month_Type is (Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun,
                    Jul, Aug, …, Dec);

documentation.description: Months of the year.

Wrapper around standard Ada time to give deferred execution for
attributes needed when formatting, e.g., don't always need to determine
the day in the week.
Day of Week in Month, e.g., 2nd Wed of July.
Day number within a year.
Hour numbers for day periods.
Minute numbers for day periods.
Second numbers for day periods (60 to account for leap seconds).
Week number within the year.
Week number within the year.

subprograms.name: Day
subprograms.code: function Day (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Day_Number

documentation.description: Return the day number associated with a wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Day_In_Week
subprograms.code: function Day_In_Week (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Day_Type

documentation.description: Return the day in the week for the wrapper object (Sun, Mon, etc).

subprograms.name: Day_Of_Week_In_Month
subprograms.code:
function Day_Of_Week_In_Month (Self : in out DateTime_Type)
   return Day_Of_Week_In_Month_Type

documentation.description: Day of Week in Month, e.g., 2nd Wed of July.

subprograms.name: Day_Of_Year
subprograms.code: function Day_Of_Year (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Day_Of_Year_Type

documentation.description: Return the day number within the year associated with a wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Fraction_Seconds
subprograms.code: function Fraction_Seconds (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Float

documentation.description: Return the fraction of seconds associated with the object.

subprograms.name: Hour
subprograms.code: function Hour (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Hour_Type

documentation.description: Return the hour (H:M:S) associated with a wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Is_Noon
subprograms.code: function Is_Noon (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Boolean

documentation.description: Is the wrapper object at 12:00?
Create a DateTime wrapper object.

subprograms.name: Minute
subprograms.code: function Minute (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Minute_Type

documentation.description: Return the minute (H:M:S) associated with a wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Modified_Julian_Day
subprograms.code: function Modified_Julian_Day (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Natural

documentation.description: Modified Julian day.

subprograms.name: Month
subprograms.code: function Month (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Month_Number

documentation.description: Return the month number associated with a wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Quarter
subprograms.code: function Quarter (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Quarter_Type

documentation.description: Return the quarter in the year for the wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Second
subprograms.code: function Second (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Second_Type

documentation.description: Return the second (H:M:S) associated with a wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Seconds
subprograms.code: function Seconds (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Day_Duration

documentation.description: Return the duration within the day (as returned by Split).

subprograms.name: Week_In_Month
subprograms.code:
function Week_In_Month (Self : in out DateTime_Type)
   return Week_In_Month_Type

documentation.description: Return the week within the month number associated with wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Week_In_Year
subprograms.code:
function Week_In_Year (Self : in out DateTime_Type)
   return Week_In_Year_Type

documentation.description: Return the week number associated with a wrapped object.

subprograms.name: Year
subprograms.code: function Year (Self : in out DateTime_Type) return Year_Number

documentation.description: Return the year number associated with a wrapped object.
